---
title: Configuration
description: Server and CLI config.yaml reference.
---

## Server configuration

The server reads `/etc/bhatti/config.yaml` (or `$BHATTI_CONFIG`). The install script generates this automatically.

### Example (generated by install)

```yaml
engine: firecracker
listen: :8080
data_dir: /var/lib/bhatti
firecracker_bin: /usr/local/bin/firecracker
firecracker_jailer: /usr/local/bin/jailer
jail_uid: 10000
jail_gid: 10000
firecracker_kernel: /var/lib/bhatti/images/vmlinux-arm64
firecracker_rootfs: /var/lib/bhatti/images/rootfs-minimal-arm64.ext4
```

### All fields

| Field | Default | Description |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `engine` | `firecracker` | Engine backend |
| `listen` | `:8080` | Address for the HTTP API |
| `data_dir` | `/var/lib/bhatti` | Root directory for state (DB, images, sandboxes) |
| `firecracker_bin` | ‚Äî | Path to the `firecracker` binary |
| `firecracker_kernel` | ‚Äî | Path to the vmlinux kernel |
| `firecracker_rootfs` | ‚Äî | Path to the default rootfs image |
| `firecracker_jailer` | ‚Äî | Path to the `jailer` binary (empty = bare mode) |
| `jail_uid` | `0` | UID for the jailed Firecracker process |
| `jail_gid` | `0` | GID for the jailed Firecracker process |
| `public_proxy_listen` | ‚Äî | Address for the public preview proxy (e.g. `:8443`) |

### Domain mode (optional)

For host-based routing with TLS (e.g. `*.bhatti.sh`):

```yaml
domain:
  api_host: api.bhatti.sh
  proxy_zone: bhatti.sh
  acme_email: you@example.com
  tls_cert: /etc/bhatti/wildcard.pem
  tls_key: /etc/bhatti/wildcard-key.pem
```

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `domain.api_host` | Hostname for the API (e.g. `api.bhatti.sh`) |
| `domain.proxy_zone` | Zone for published sandboxes (e.g. `bhatti.sh` ‚Üí `alias.bhatti.sh`) |
| `domain.acme_email` | Email for per-alias Let's Encrypt certs (fallback) |
| `domain.tls_cert` | Path to wildcard TLS certificate (recommended) |
| `domain.tls_key` | Path to wildcard TLS key |

### Volume backup (optional)

```yaml
backup:
  s3_endpoint: https://s3.eu-central-003.backblazeb2.com
  s3_region: eu-central-003
  s3_bucket: bhatti-backups
  s3_access_key: ...
  s3_secret_key: ...
  schedule:
    - volume: workspace
      cron: "0 3 * * *"
      retention: 7
```

## CLI configuration

CLI users configure their client with `bhatti setup` or manually.

### Config file

`~/.bhatti/config.yaml`:

```yaml
api_url: https://api.bhatti.sh
auth_token: bht_your_key_here
```

### Environment variables

```bash
export BHATTI_URL=https://api.bhatti.sh
export BHATTI_TOKEN=bht_your_key_here
```

### Priority

`--flag` > environment variable > config file > default.

## Data directory layout

```
/var/lib/bhatti/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ state.db              SQLite database (WAL mode)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ age.key               secret encryption key (created on first secret set)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ id_ed25519 / .pub     SSH keypair
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ images/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ vmlinux-arm64     kernel
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ rootfs-minimal-arm64.ext4
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ rootfs-browser-arm64.ext4
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ sandboxes/<id>/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ rootfs.ext4       CoW copy of base rootfs
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ config.ext4       config drive (1MB)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ vol-<name>.ext4   attached volumes
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ firecracker.sock  FC API socket
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ mem.snap          memory snapshot (when cold)
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ vm.snap           VM state snapshot (when cold)
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ volumes/
    ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ <name>.ext4       standalone volumes
```
